_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: No classic counterpart at this path — the project-wide finding list is exposed only via MCP (list_findings) in the classic generation. Loom is the first HTTP surface for it. finding_id replaces id at the entity primary-key level.

shape_decl.request_type: GET; query params: limit, offset, severity, status, scan_source, scan_run_id, file_id, issue_id
shape_decl.rationale: ScanFindingLoom = ScanFindingDict with id renamed to finding_id; cross-entity refs (file_id, issue_id) keep their names. Drops MCP's 'total' field per the strict ListResponse envelope.

body.error: Invalid severity filter "catastrophic". Must be one of: critical, high, info, low, medium
